product_overview: Eli Moving Services is a responsive landing page website for a moving company. It presents services, service areas, pricing estimates, and contact options to help visitors quickly request a quote by phone or WhatsApp.
core_goals: Provide clear information about the company’s moving services
Allow visitors to estimate moving costs using an interactive calculator
Encourage quote requests through prominent phone and WhatsApp calls to action
Support Hebrew, English, and French content with correct layout direction
Ensure the site is accessible, mobile-friendly, and keyboard navigable

features.name: Language Switcher
features.description: Lets visitors switch the site language between Hebrew, English, and French while updating page text, URL, and reading direction.
user_flows: GET /locales/he.json -> Receive Hebrew translations -> Click language button in navbar -> Select English -> GET /locales/en.json -> Receive English translations -> URL changes to /en and page switches to LTR

GET /locales/he.json -> Receive Hebrew translations -> Click language button in navbar -> Select French -> GET /locales/fr.json -> Receive French translations -> URL changes to /fr and page switches to LTR
GET /locales/en.json -> Receive 200 with translations -> Select unsupported or missing language key -> Receive fallback behavior with no page update or default language retained

features.name: Skip to Content Link
features.description: Provides an accessibility shortcut that allows keyboard users to jump directly to the main content.
user_flows: Press Tab on page load -> Focus reveals skip link -> Press Enter -> Browser jumps to main content section
Press Tab on page load -> Focus reveals skip link -> Press Enter while main content is unavailable or malformed -> Focus remains on page shell and no content jump occurs

features.name: Keyboard Navigation
features.description: Ensures all interactive elements are accessible via keyboard, including navigation links, calculator controls, checkboxes, and CTAs.
user_flows: Press Tab to move through nav links, hamburger menu, calculator controls, and CTA buttons -> Focus ring appears on each element -> Press Enter or Space to activate the focused control
Press Tab to reach a disabled or unavailable control -> Attempt Enter/Space -> No action is triggered and focus continues to the next element

features.name: Moving Cost Calculator
features.description: Allows visitors to estimate moving costs based on room count, floor number, and optional packing or unpacking services.
user_flows: Click + on room counter -> POST/JS state update in calculator -> Total price recalculates immediately -> aria-live announces the updated estimate -> Click WhatsApp CTA to request a quote
Click - on room counter at minimum value 1 -> Value remains at 1 -> Total price stays valid and no negative rooms are allowed
Toggle packing checkbox and unpacking checkbox -> Price breakdown recalculates in real time -> Select multiple options -> Total estimate updates correctly
Enter invalid state such as attempting to decrease floor below 0 -> Floor remains at 0 -> Calculator shows no negative floor charge and continues to function
Click WhatsApp CTA after viewing estimate -> Open external WhatsApp chat using the hardcoded contact number -> User leaves the calculator without submitting a backend form

features.name: Mobile Navigation (Hamburger Menu)
features.description: Opens a fullscreen navigation overlay on small screens so users can access all page sections.
user_flows: Resize or open on a ≤640px viewport -> Click hamburger button -> aria-expanded changes to true -> Fullscreen menu overlay opens -> Click a section link -> Page scrolls to section and overlay closes
Open hamburger menu -> Attempt to activate when JavaScript is unavailable -> Menu does not expand and navigation remains in standard page flow

features.name: Smooth Scroll Navigation
features.description: Uses anchor links and scripted scrolling to move users to key sections of the landing page.
user_flows: Click Services link in navbar -> Browser scrolls smoothly to services section -> Section content becomes visible
Click Get a Quote button -> Browser scrolls smoothly to the contact or calculator section -> User can continue to CTA
Click a section link with an invalid or missing target -> No smooth scroll occurs and page remains in place

features.name: WhatsApp & Phone CTAs
features.description: Provides multiple contact actions across the page, including a fixed WhatsApp button and phone call links.
user_flows: Click floating WhatsApp button -> Browser opens WhatsApp chat with the company number -> User can send a message without leaving the landing page context
Click Call Now button in hero -> Browser opens the device dialer using the hardcoded phone number -> User initiates a phone call
Click a contact link with unsupported calling capability -> Browser may not open a dialer/chat client -> User remains on the page with no backend fallback

features.name: Accessibility Statement Page
features.description: Shows a Hebrew accessibility statement describing compliance with SI 5568 and WCAG 2.1 AA, plus contact options.
user_flows: Navigate to /accessibility -> Receive the accessibility statement page -> Read compliance details and contact information -> Click phone or WhatsApp links to contact the business
Navigate to /accessibility -> Attempt to use a broken or unavailable internal link -> Page remains accessible and user can continue reading
Navigate to /accessibility with an unsupported browser state -> Page loads but external contact actions may fail if the device lacks calling or messaging support

features.name: Legal Pages (Privacy, Terms, Cookies)
features.description: Provides Hebrew legal pages for privacy policy, terms of use, and cookie policy with navigation back to the main site.
user_flows: Navigate to /privacy -> Receive the privacy policy page in Hebrew -> Read legal content -> Click back-to-site link -> Return to the landing page
Navigate to /terms -> Receive the terms of use page -> Click footer cross-link to /cookies -> Receive the cookie policy page
Navigate to /cookies -> Attempt to open a missing or invalid legal cross-link -> Receive a standard page with no navigation change or a fallback not found behavior

features.name: Footer Legal Links
features.description: Adds legal navigation in the footer so users can reach accessibility, privacy, terms, and cookies pages from any section of the site.
user_flows: Scroll to footer -> Click Accessibility Statement link -> Navigate to /accessibility -> Read the accessibility content
Scroll to footer -> Click Privacy Policy link -> Navigate to /privacy -> Read the privacy policy
Scroll to footer -> Click Terms of Use link -> Navigate to /terms -> Read the terms page
Scroll to footer -> Click Cookie Policy link -> Navigate to /cookies -> Read the cookie policy
Click a footer link when the target page is unavailable -> Browser cannot resolve the route -> User stays on the current page or sees a navigation failure

routes.description: Accessibility statement (SI 5568 / WCAG 2.1 AA) in Hebrew

features.name: Language Switcher
features.description: Navbar dropdown to switch between Hebrew, English, French. Updates URL, direction, and all text.
user_interactions: Click language button in navbar to open dropdown
Select Hebrew, English, or French
All page text updates instantly without reload
URL changes to /he, /en, or /fr
Page direction switches RTL/LTR

features.name: Skip to Content Link
features.description: Visually hidden link at top of page that becomes visible on keyboard focus, jumps to main content.
user_interactions: Press Tab on page load to reveal skip link
Press Enter to jump to main content area

features.name: Keyboard Navigation
features.description: Full keyboard navigation across all interactive elements — nav links, hamburger, language switcher, calculator steppers, checkboxes, CTA buttons.
user_interactions: Tab through all focusable elements in order
Visible orange focus ring appears on focused element
Enter/Space activates buttons and links

features.name: Moving Cost Calculator
features.description: Interactive estimator with room count, floor number, packing/unpacking toggles. Live price breakdown updates on every change.
user_interactions: Click + or - to set number of rooms (min 1)
Click + or - to set floor number (min 0)
Toggle packing service checkbox
Toggle unpacking service checkbox
Price breakdown updates in real time
Total announced to screen readers via aria-live
Click WhatsApp CTA for exact quote

features.name: Mobile Navigation (Hamburger Menu)
features.description: Hamburger button (aria-label, aria-expanded) visible at ≤640px. Opens fullscreen nav overlay.
user_interactions: Click hamburger button to open mobile menu
aria-expanded toggles true/false
Click nav link to scroll to section and close menu

features.name: Smooth Scroll Navigation
features.description: Navbar anchor links scroll to sections. Implemented via JS scrollIntoView for accessibility.
user_interactions: Click Services to scroll to
Click Why Us to scroll to
Click Areas to scroll to
Click Calculator to scroll to
Click Get a Quote to scroll to

features.name: WhatsApp & Phone CTAs
features.description: Multiple CTAs throughout the page and a fixed floating WhatsApp button.
user_interactions: Click floating WhatsApp button (aria-label present)
Click WhatsApp button in hero
Click Call Now button in hero
Click contact section buttons

features.name: Accessibility Statement Page
features.description: Full Hebrew accessibility statement per SI 5568 and WCAG 2.1 AA.
user_interactions: Navigate to /accessibility
Read accessibility commitments and contact info
Click phone/WhatsApp links
Use skip link to jump to content

features.name: Legal Pages (Privacy, Terms, Cookies)
features.description: Hebrew legal pages for privacy policy, terms of use, and cookie policy.
user_interactions: Navigate to /privacy, /terms, /cookies
Read Hebrew legal content
Click back-to-site link in header
Click cross-links between legal pages in footer

features.name: Footer Legal Links
features.description: Legal navigation in footer linking to accessibility, privacy, terms, cookies pages.
user_interactions: Scroll to footer
Click Accessibility Statement link → navigate to /accessibility
Click Privacy Policy link → navigate to /privacy
Click Terms of Use link → navigate to /terms
Click Cookie Policy link → navigate to /cookies

known_limitations.issue: Canvas scroll animation is disabled when prefers-reduced-motion is set
known_limitations.impact: Hero background is blank for users with reduced-motion preference — intentional accessibility behavior

known_limitations.issue: Calculator shows preliminary estimates only; not connected to backend
known_limitations.impact: No form submission or data persistence; estimates are client-side only

known_limitations.issue: WhatsApp and phone links use hardcoded number
known_limitations.impact: All CTAs point to same phone number regardless of language
